articles.value: Remastering the Eternal Bargain Commander Precon
articles.excerpt: The Eternal Bargain precon from Commander 2013, featuring Oloro, Ageless Ascetic, is in need of a refresh. Let's modernize it.
EDHREC is getting festive for the holidays by showing you the most Christmas-y commanders that AREN'T in Gruul colors.

container.description: Popular decks and cards for Sydri, Galvanic Genius
container.title: Sydri, Galvanic Genius (Commander) - Optimized
